//ui: OPTIONAL (#19). Omit this key entirely and nothing changes — non-UI repos are unaffected.
When present, a PR whose diff matches verifyGlobs MUST publish screenshots or the loop
refuses to merge it. The layer never renders: renderCmd is YOUR command and your
dockerBaseImage must contain whatever it needs (e.g. a browser). The agent pushes images
to artifactBranch (an orphan branch, never merged) under pr-<n>/.
verifyGlobs    globs that mark a PR UI-touching
renderCmd      writes images into artifactDir; capture desktop + narrow, dark + light
canonDir       optional canonical mockups to compare against
